title: 問答無用のマーベラス☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
There is but one answer to your woes, and that is
to become more marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: More marvelous? Uh... What do you mean by—

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
By marveling at marvels, of course! The fact that
we were born... The fact that we crossed paths...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Why, they're all fabulous miracles! Destiny!
Statistically marvelous marvels!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
You've been marvelous since you were born! ☆
And the fact that you're here in this moment is
equally marvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I see! Destiny and miracles... They're both
marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, I think I feel a bit better now!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Nice! Oh, you there, do you have something
weighing on your mind too? Well, come on over!
I'm all ears! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous Sunday looks at me with shining,
expectant eyes... Well, I might as well ask for her
advice while I'm here.
choice_data_list: I want to be more motivated.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: I see! That's okay! The fact that you've noticed how tired you are is really great! It's marvelous even! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
If you continue to believe in yourself, then you'll
be filled with marvelous power one day!
Ahahaha! ☆ Ahahaha! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: I see! That's okay! The fact that you want to want to be more motivated is really great! It's marvelous even! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
If you keep doing what you're doing, I'm sure
you'll naturally find the motivation one day!
Ahahaha! ☆ Ahahaha! ★
